name: Asparagus Lasagne Bianco
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles as directed on package; drain and cut in half crosswise.
2. In a saucepan, cook garlic and thyme in butter. Blend in flour; cook, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in milk; cook, stirring constantly until thickened. Season sauce with salt and pepper.
4. In a buttered, 2-quart microwaveable dish, layer 1/3 of noodles, sauce, cheese, ham and asparagus.
5. Repeat layers twice.
6. Cover and cook on high for 10 minutes, turning twice.
